dataQualityWarnings: procedures returned no items matching the subject within the date window
adopted texts returned no items matching the subject within the date window
plenary-session document items returned no items matching the subject within the date window
parliamentary questions returned no items matching the subject within the date window
methodology: Legislative effectiveness scoring built from four EP Open Data Portal sources fanned out under a 6000ms per-source timeout (Promise.allSettled): /procedures (rapporteur / shadow-rapporteur / opinion-rapporteur attribution), /adopted-texts (success-rate denominator), /plenary-session-documents-items (amendments tabled + adoption flag from document status), /parliamentary-questions (questions filed, filtered by author and date). For subjectType=COMMITTEE the aggregator sums per-MEP attributions across the committee membership returned by /corporate-bodies. legislativeSuccessRate = procedures-with-adopted-text / attributed-procedures (0-100). Each metric carries a per-source dataAvailability flag so downstream tools can branch on real coverage. Data source: European Parliament Open Data Portal (data.europarl.europa.eu).
sourceAttribution: European Parliament Open Data Portal - data.europarl.europa.eu
